payload.answer: I can help handle this as a candidate memory update, but I won’t save it yet. The statement appears to add family information: “Nur and Sara are my twin daughters.”
repair_options: Add a new memory that Nur and Sara are the user’s twin daughters.
Keep this as a separate family fact without merging it into any existing memories.
Ask the user to confirm whether both Nur and Sara should be remembered as their twin daughters.
